failure_movement.justification: Direction mostly right: empty 25→18 (-7, predicted 10-18 shrink, actual below range), correct 38→47 (+9), unknown 33→29 (-4, predicted 2-4). But predicted 10-18 empty-to-correct conversions; only 6 occurred. Wrong cluster partially right but magnitude overstated.

trace_movement.justification: Prediction claimed completion tokens would rise to 200-400 and avg tokens up 50-100; actual went DOWN 168.6→148.7, no task exceeded 256 tokens. Retrieved docs claim (3-4→5-7) wrong; both iters have ~18.6 docs/task. Empty predictions dropped 25→18, not <5 as predicted. Nearly all specific trace claims contradicted.

side_effects.justification: Regression count correctly predicted (0-3; actual 2). Token consumption rise incorrectly predicted (actual fell ~20). reasoning_content fallback risk flagged but unverifiable. Missed that max_tokens doubling had no effect (still capped at 256 actual tokens), a key unflagged failure mode.
